title: moquilea chocoensis
intro: Moquilea chocoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, also known as the coffee family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ecuador for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and roots of Moquilea chocoensis have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain and discomfort. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves are also used as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
